languages.text: "Нейронные синапсы моего органического когитатора наполнены восторгом. Силы агрегата восстановлены!"

traits.locale_text: "Нейронные синапсы моего органического когитатора наполнены восторгом. Священный агрегат восстановлен!"

languages.text: "The neural synapses of my organic cogitator are filled with rapture. The machine's powers have been restored!"
languages.original_text: "Нейронные синапсы моего органического когитатора наполнены восторгом. Силы агрегата восстановлены!"

traits.locale_text: "The neural synapses of my organic cogitator are filled with rapture. This unit's powers have been restored!"
"The neural synapses of my organic cogitator are filled with rapture. This unit's powers have been restored!"
"The neural synapses of my organic cogitator are filled with rapture. This unit's powers have been restored!"

languages.text: 「有機的な思考装置の神経シナプスが歓喜に満ちている。このユニットの能力が回復した！」
languages.original_text: "The neural synapses of my organic cogitator are filled with rapture. This unit's powers have been restored!"

languages.text: "Organik kavramsayarımın sinir sinapsları, vecd ile doldu. Makinenin güçleri geri geldi!"
languages.original_text: "The neural synapses of my organic cogitator are filled with rapture. The machine's powers have been restored!"

traits.locale_text: "Organik kavramsayarımın sinir sinapsları, vecd ile doldu. Makinenin güçleri geri geldi!"

languages.text: “有机沉思者的神经突触充盈着喜悦。这台机器的力量已然恢复！”
languages.original_text: "The neural synapses of my organic cogitator are filled with rapture. The machine's powers have been restored!"

traits.locale_text: “有机沉思者的神经突触充盈着喜悦。这台机器的力量已然恢复！”

languages.text: "Die neuralen Synapsen meines organischen Cogitators sind begeistert. Die Kräfte der Maschine wurden wiederhergestellt!"
languages.original_text: "The neural synapses of my organic cogitator are filled with rapture. The machine's powers have been restored!"

traits.locale_text: "Die neuralen Synapsen meines organischen Cogitators sind begeistert. Die Kräfte der Maschine wurden wiederhergestellt!"

languages.text: « Les synapses neuronales de mon cogitateur organique sont en plein extase. Les pouvoirs de cette machine ont été restaurés ! »
languages.original_text: "The neural synapses of my organic cogitator are filled with rapture. The machine's powers have been restored!"

traits.locale_text: « Les synapses neuronales de mon cogitateur organique sont en plein extase. Les pouvoirs de cette machine ont été restaurés ! »

languages.text: «Las sinapsis neuronales de mi cogitador orgánico se llenan de gozo. ¡Los poderes de la máquina han sido restaurados!».
languages.original_text: "The neural synapses of my organic cogitator are filled with rapture. The machine's powers have been restored!"

traits.locale_text: «Las sinapsis neuronales de mi cogitador orgánico se llenan de gozo. ¡Los poderes de la máquina han sido restaurados!».
